question_text: A sound wave has a wavelength of 2 metres and a frequency of 170 Hz. Which statement correctly describes this sound?

options.label: A
options.text: It is a high-pitched sound because it has a long wavelength

options.label: B
options.text: It is a high-pitched sound because it has a high frequency

options.label: C
options.text: It is a low-pitched sound because it has a long wavelength

options.label: D
options.text: It is a low-pitched sound because it has a high frequency

explanation: Pitch is determined by frequency, not wavelength. A higher frequency (170 Hz is relatively high) produces a higher pitch sound. The wavelength is less important for determining pitch than the frequency.
